'''Greezim Trentacal''' was a bulky [[Slavery/Legends|slavemaster]] for the [[Karazak Slavers' Cooperative/Legends|Karazak Slavers Cooperative]] on [[Gabredor III/Legends|Gabredor III]] who worked with the [[Pentastar Alignment]] and kidnapped two children of a businessman who was trying to defect to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He was killed while trying to take off in the ''[[Atron's Mistress]]'', possibly by a mute slave girl he kept.<ref name="Blaze of Glory" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|8|Blaze of Glory (short story)|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
